design_philosophy.core_loop: Time-trial arcade racing through varied courses with increasing speed demands; qualify within time limits to progress to next course
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Racing against the clock across diverse track layouts while managing vehicle control and line precision
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: High-speed driving in a Lotus sports car through dynamically varied environments (winter, motorway, scenic routes) with arcade immediacy
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Shifted from sim-like fuel management and lap-racing (original game) to pure arcade time-trial format; fuel limits and difficulty selection removed for console appeal; course-based progression over multiple lap accumulation emphasizes moment-to-moment speed and precision over strategic resource management

difficulty.continues_system: Password system allows players to resume at specific race points after qualifying
difficulty.checkpointing: Password-based checkpoint system; once player qualifies for a race, a password is revealed to access that race directly
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Arcade mode provides consistent difficulty curve with no adjustable difficulty settings; player must qualify within set time limits to progress

progression.unlock_mechanism: Time-trial qualification gates; player must complete each course within specified time limit to qualify for next course and receive password
replayability_hooks: Password system enables non-linear replay of unlocked courses
Hidden content accessible via password (easter egg Kwazy Kwaks level)
Two-player simultaneous split-screen racing encourages competitive replays
Varied course environments (winter, motorway, scenic) provide distinct driving challenges

world_building_techniques: Distinct environmental theming per course (winter scenery, motorway with crossing lorries, varied landscape backdrops)
Hazard variety reflects environment (slippery roads on winter courses, obstacles and hazards contextual to location)
In-game announcer provides reactive feedback (taunts, celebratory 'Yeehaa!' for hidden tricks like driving under lorry trailers)

danger_signals: Road hazards: slippery puddles, wooden logs, road blocks that vary by environment
Environmental obstacles: crossing lorries on motorway level, winter ice conditions
Opponent vehicles in multiple colors (gameplay mechanic rather than faction signaling)
environmental_storytelling: Winter courses with slippery road conditions establish seasonal environment
Motorway level with crossing lorry traffic creates dynamic highway setting
Scenic variation across 16 courses suggests diverse geographical locations
Road-side sign density communicates turn difficulty and upcoming hazards

sources_used: wikipedia: Lotus (video game series) - Lotus Turbo Challenge 2 section
